overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked neon-lit urban promenade in Night City. The player moves from a waterfront walkway past a dramatically illuminated tree toward a commercial food stall area, culminating in a sudden close-quarters combat encounter with multiple bodies scattered across the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit waterfront promenade with safety barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet promenade toward the illuminated tower, passing wooden benches and planters

notable_agents.action: walking in the opposite direction along the promenade

entered.detail: continuous orange railing running along the right side of the walkway
tall cylindrical building wrapped with red and white neon horizontal bands
modern high-rise with illuminated grid-pattern windows
backless wooden seating with integrated lighting along the base
rectangular planters containing tall spiky ornamental plants

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked pedestrian promenade at night, bordered by an orange safety railing on the right and modern architecture on the left. The player walks forward toward a distinctive cylindrical tower wrapped in neon lights, passing illuminated benches and planters. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined pedestrian walkway approaching commercial stalls

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on the large illuminated tree canopy against the night sky
passing the tree and approaching the commercial food stall area with bright signage

agents.ego_description: approaching the large tree, looking up at its illuminated branches, then continuing toward the food stalls

entered.detail: mature tree with thick trunk and spreading canopy dramatically lit from below by spotlights
low orange building with multiple illuminated menu boards and neon advertisements
red and white automated vending unit with glowing display

segments.scene_description: The player approaches a large tree dramatically lit from below, causing the camera to tilt upward and admire the canopy. After passing the tree, the scene transitions toward a commercial area featuring an orange food stall building with bright neon signage. The cylindrical tower shifts to the right as the path curves slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with food vendors and combat debris

events.description: player character engages in close-quarters combat with an enemy among several bodies on the ground

agents.ego_description: moving through the commercial plaza and engaging in hand-to-hand combat with an enemy combatant near several fallen bodies

notable_agents.action: enemy combatant being attacked by the player character in a melee takedown

entered.detail: pink neon sign reading 'BRAIN WASH' mounted on the building facade
multiple deceased individuals lying on the yellow pavement with blood pools
dark blood stains spreading across the tiled ground near the bodies

segments.scene_description: The player enters a commercial plaza with yellow tiled pavement, passing vending machines and approaching a food stall marked by a 'BRAIN WASH' neon sign. The area is littered with bodies and blood stains. The player engages in sudden combat with an enemy combatant among the debris, performing a melee takedown as the camera moves through the chaotic scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked neon promenade that transforms from a serene urban walk into a chaotic combat zone. It begins by moving along a pedestrian walkway bordered by an orange safety railing and modern architecture, heading toward a cylindrical tower wrapped in neon lights. As the camera passes illuminated benches, it tilts upward to admire the canopy of a dramatically lit tree before the path curves toward a commercial area featuring a bright orange food stall. The scene then opens into a yellow-tiled plaza where the atmosphere shifts abruptly, revealing vending machines and a Brain Wash neon sign surrounded by blood stains and fallen bodies. Finally, the movement culminates in a sudden melee takedown of an enemy combatant amidst the debris of the plaza.
